# Community Radio Station Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-community-radio-community-radio-site
**Vertical slug:** community-radio
**VN-ID:** VN-MED-004
**Niche family:** standalone
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Community radio in Nigeria is regulated by the National Broadcasting Commission (NBC) under the NBC Act Cap N11 LFN 2004. As of 2026, Nigeria has approximately 120+ licensed community radio stations, concentrated in rural areas, university campuses, and LGA headquarters. Key operators include Radio Benue, Harvest FM, Liberty FM Ibadan, and various university community radio stations. Community radio serves as a critical voice for local governance, health campaigns (NPHCDA), agricultural extension, and cultural preservation in indigenous languages. Revenue comes from low-cost advertising by local SMEs, LGA public information campaigns, donor support (USAID, MacArthur Foundation), and events sponsorship. Most stations operate with a 5–50kW transmitter serving 30–100km radius.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Chika Okonkwo, LGA Secretary, Enugu** — Uses community radio to broadcast council announcements, public health campaigns. Wants a station website with programme schedule and listener feedback.
- **Alhaji Musa Danladi, Local Advertiser, Kano** — Grain merchant who advertises on community radio for Hausa-language reach. Wants to know rates and programmes.
- **Dr Funke Adeyemi, Community Health Nurse, Oyo** — Partners with local station for maternal health messaging. Needs programme sponsorship info.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Station branding, live stream embed, current programme, WhatsApp listener line, top sponsors
- **About**: Station history, NBC licence number, coverage area, team, mission
- **Services/Programming**: Full programme schedule (Monday–Sunday grid), advertising rates in NGN, sponsorship packages
- **Contact**: WhatsApp listener line, advertiser enquiry form, NDPR-compliant, studio address

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Warm, community-first, accessible. Mix of formal (regulatory legitimacy) and conversational (radio personality). Taglines: "Your Voice, Your Community", "Radio kwa Jamii" (Swahili influence OK), "Listening to Nigeria". Primary CTA: "WhatsApp Us" (listener feedback). Secondary CTA: "Advertise With Us". AVOID: corporate cold language, heavy English legalese.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- NBC Licence number prominently displayed
- FRCN (Federal Radio Corporation) affiliation where applicable
- CAC NGO/company registration
- Coverage area map or description (e.g., "serving Ikeja LGA and environs")
- Partner logos (UNICEF, USAID, FHI360 if applicable)
- On-air team photos with local names
- WhatsApp listener line number
- Paystack/bank transfer for advertising payments

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Nigerian female presenter at a modest but functional studio console, smiling — warm studio lighting
2. Community gathering listening to a portable radio under a tree in rural northern Nigeria — village setting
3. Station manager in traditional attire shaking hands with LGA chairman — Yoruba south-west
4. Close-up of an NBC licence certificate framed on a wall behind a studio desk
5. Female farmer in a field with earbuds in, listening to agricultural programme in Edo State
6. Youth volunteers carrying "Radio Community Voices" branded t-shirts at an outside broadcast event
7. Studio exterior — a modest single-storey building with antenna mast and station signage in Nigerian neighbourhood

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- NBC licence number on every page (footer at minimum)
- Content quota compliance note (60% local content requirement under NBC code)
- Watershed programming notice
- Community ownership structure disclosure (if required by NBC)
- NDPR-compliant listener and advertiser data handling
- CAC registration number

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- WhatsApp listener line on home + contact ✅
- All advertising rates in NGN ✅
- Nigerian cities and LGA names ✅
- Nigerian presenter/staff names ✅
- NBC licence trust signal ✅
- Paystack/bank transfer payment ✅
- 375px mobile responsive ✅
- esc() on all user strings ✅
- NDPR consent on contact/advertiser form ✅
